title: Seed-Swap Network: Heirloom Steward
strategies: weak baseline: immediate length-2-cycles ONLY, first-found, no hoarding (reproduces the evaluator's reference; ~0.1)
textbook greedy: immediate length-2 then length-3 cycles, every round, exhaustively -- but burns scarce Moon-and-Stars holders on the first reciprocal partner it meets

type-flow-aware steward: force-resolves gardeners at their last valid round, always prefers length-3 cycles over length-2, and computes global have/want imbalance per type to bank non-forced holders of oversubscribed types for a bigger cycle instead of the first available one
(invalid: wrong top-level JSON key -> structurally rejected, scores 0)
